rules.name: Generic_Downloader_A
rules.author: Yara-Rules Project
rules.content:
rule Generic_Downloader_A
{
    meta:
        description = "Generic malware downloader strings"
        author = "Yara-Rules Project"
        reference = "https://github.com/Yara-Rules/rules"
    strings:
        $s1 = "URLDownloadToFile" ascii
        $s2 = "WinExec" ascii
        $s3 = "GetTempPathA" ascii
    condition:
        2 of them
}

rules.name: APT_Sample_Payload_Hash
rules.author: ThreatLens Community Seed
rules.content:
import "hash"

rule APT_Sample_Payload_Hash
{
    meta:
        description = "Detects a known malicious payload by SHA-256 (T1204.002)"
        author = "ThreatLens Community Seed"
        hash = "275a021bbfb6489e54d471899f7db9d1663fc695ec2fe2a2c4538aabf651fd0f"
        actor = "APT29"
    condition:
        hash.sha256(0, filesize) == "275a021bbfb6489e54d471899f7db9d1663fc695ec2fe2a2c4538aabf651fd0f"
}

rules.name: Suspicious_PowerShell_Encoded
rules.author: Florian Roth
rules.content:
rule Suspicious_PowerShell_Encoded
{
    meta:
        description = "Detects encoded PowerShell command usage"
        author = "Florian Roth"
    strings:
        $a = "powershell" nocase
        $b = "-enc" nocase
        $c = "FromBase64String" nocase
    condition:
        $a and ($b or $c)
}
